|prev=Eventually the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]]<ref name="Date">According to ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'', [[Brenn Tantor]] became an Imperial officer just before the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]] and defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] just after the [[Massacre on Abridon]]. ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' dates those events respectively to 0 BBY and c. 4 ABY.</ref>

{{Quote|Sure, they don't look like much. But when you're trapped on Eos, where the electromagnetic fields keep 'advanced' airspeeders grounded, you'll wish you had a whole fleet of AT-PTs.|[[Brenn Tantor]]|<ref name="TNEGtVaV" />}}
The '''Battle of Eos''' was a battle during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. During the battle, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] were grounded because of the electromagnetic fields on [[Eos]]. Imperial officer [[Brenn Tantor]] deplored the fact that [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PTs]] were not used instead.<ref name="TNEGtVaV" />

{{Battle-stub}}
